title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 57.090 - To attend courts — when
text:
57.090.  To attend courts — when. — The several sheriffs shall attend each division of the circuit court presided over by a circuit or associate circuit judge held in their counties, when so directed by the court; and it shall be the duty of the officer attending any court to furnish stationery, fuel, and other things necessary for the use of the court whenever ordered by the court.
(RSMo 1939 § 2034, A.L. 1945 p. 805, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1870; 1919 § 2365; 1909 § 3887 
Effective 1-02-79
